document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Eastern Passage/Cow Bay

provisions.text: P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: INSTITUTIONAL USES In any P -2 Zone, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area: central services 10,000 square feet (929 m2) on-site services 30,000 square feet (RC-Feb 19/98;M-Apr 27/98) Minimum Frontage 125 feet (RC-Feb 19/98;M -Apr 27/98) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 1/2 the height of the main building Maximum Lot Coverage 50 percent

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: OPEN SPACE USES

provisions.text: P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: OPEN SPACE USES In any P -2 Zone, where uses are permitted as Open Space Uses, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 15 feet (4.6 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 15 feet (4.6 m)
EXEMPTION: OPEN SPACE USES Notwithstanding Section 4.1(a), where uses permitted as Open Space Uses, and where such uses involve no buildings or structures, no development permit shall be required.

EXEMPTION: INSTITUTIONAL USES Notwithstanding Section 23.2, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, a building may be exempted from a yard requirement in order to permit it to be joined to a building on an adjacent parcel and in this case, all other yard requirements shall apply.

EXEMPTION: EXISTING COMMERCIAL RECREATION USE Notwithstanding the provisions of Section 23.1, a trap and skeet club shall be permitted on the property identified by PID 00638247 and shall be permitted to expand, subject to compliance with the requirements of Section 23.2, but no other commercial recreation use shall be permitted on the property. (CHWEPCB -Sep 7/95;E-Oct 6/95) (HECC-May 11/09; E-May 30/09)

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any P -2 (Community Facility) Zone except for

Institutional Uses Educational institutions and uses; Denominational institutions and uses; Day care facilities; A single dwelling unit in conjunction with a daycare facility; Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms; (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Shared housing with special care; (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Fire and police stations; Government offices and public works except transportation maintenance yards; Hospitals and medical clinics; Public libraries, museums and galleries; Fraternal centres and halls; Community centres and halls. Open Space Uses Public and private parks and playgrounds; Recreation uses excluding golf courses (RC-May 15/01;E-Jun 23/01) Cemeteries except crematoriums; Day camps; Historic sites and monuments.
In any P -2 Zone, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, no development permit

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: shall be issued except in conformity with the following:
content_blocks.text: Minimum Lot Area: central services 10,000 square feet (929 m2) on-site services 30,000 square feet (RC-Feb 19/98;M-Apr 27/98) Minimum Frontage 125 feet (RC-Feb 19/98;M -Apr 27/98) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 1/2 the height of the main building Maximum Lot Coverage 50 percent

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: 23.3 P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: OPEN SPACE USES
content_blocks.text: In any P -2 Zone, where uses are permitted as Open Space Uses, no development permit

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: shall be issued except in conformity with the following:
content_blocks.text: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 15 feet (4.6 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 15 feet (4.6 m)
Notwithstanding Section 4.1(a), where uses permitted as Open Space Uses, and where such uses involve no buildings or structures, no development permit shall be required.

Notwithstanding Section 23.2, where uses are permitted as Institutional Uses, a building may be exempted from a yard requirement in order to permit it to be joined to a building on an adjacent parcel and in this case, all other yard requirements shall apply.

Notwithstanding the provisions of Section 23.1, a trap and skeet club shall be permitted on the property identified by PID 00638247 and shall be permitted to expand, subject to compliance with the requirements of Section 23.2, but no other commercial recreation use shall be permitted on the property. (CHWEPCB -Sep 7/95;E-Oct 6/95) (HECC-May 11/09; E-May 30/09)

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
